name: Comedy Script Generator
description: Generate comedy video scripts using Claude AI and post them to Slack. Provide a topic or trending theme, and the AI writes a punchy, ready-to-film comedy script with scene directions, dialogue, and timing notes.

source.originalName: Generate Funny AI Videos with Sora 2 and Auto-Publish to TikTok

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the comedy script

topic.description: Comedy topic or theme (e.g. 'working from home fails', 'first date disasters')

style.description: Script style: short-form sketch, standup bit, sitcom scene, or TikTok skit

duration.description: Target video duration (e.g. '30 seconds', '60 seconds', '2 minutes')
